title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: He accidentally broke his neighbour's window.

questions.firstSentence: It isn't necessary for you to stay late.
The test results were so poor that the class had to retake it.
questions.secondSentence: They were (1) _________ that the class had to retake it.

questions.firstSentence: She succeeded in getting a promotion.
He was in the habit of watching the news at ten.
She told me, 'I have already sent the email.'
He might have left without saying goodbye.
